properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v3 v3 v7 v8 v7 v9 v10

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is a name Who reigns without contention Whose power can't be questioned or contained

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: With humble fame He rules the earth and heavens His glory knows no measure or refrain And it's bursting past the border lines of space

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus Enthroned upon the praises of our hearts Jesus You're the King and You're the center of it all

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There is a name Reaching past the margins Calling sons and daughters back to Him

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And as He saves We can hear the roar of Heaven As prodigals are coming home again

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Oh the triumph of His name will never end

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: For every eye will see Every heart will know There is no name above The name of Jesus

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Death could not hold Him down No grave could keep Him bound All sin and sickness bow To the name of Jesus

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Death could not hold Him down No grave could keep Him bound All sin and sickness bow To the name of Jesus To the name of Jesus To the name of Jesus

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Jesus Enthroned upon the praises of our hearts Jesus You're the King and You're the center of it all Jesus Enthroned upon the praises of our hearts Jesus You're the King and You're the center of it all Jesus Enthroned upon the praises of our hearts Jesus You're the King and You're the center of it all Jesus Enthroned upon the praises of our hearts Jesus You're the King and You're the center of it all Jesus Enthroned upon the praises of our hearts Jesus You're the King and You're the center of it all
